outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump's objectives for the Iran war keep changing as he hints at exit in '2-3 weeks'
outlets.summary: Analysis of shifting war goals: from nuclear disarmament to 'stone age' rhetoric. Questions whether objectives have been met.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump hints at end to military action, saying US will leave Iran in '2 or 3 weeks'
outlets.summary: Reports on Trump's exit timeline, multi-front fighting, and growing domestic economic pressure from $4 gas.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump to address nation on Iran war Wednesday night
outlets.summary: Focuses on Trump's planned address, military progress, and Iran's weakening negotiating position.

outlets.name: Media Matters
outlets.headline: Fox News' united front in support of Trump's Iran war may be breaking down
outlets.summary: Reports on Laura Ingraham and others at Fox News breaking from unified pro-war stance.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran FM tells Al Jazeera: 'No truth' to US-Iranian negotiations — trust at zero
outlets.summary: Exclusive interview: Araghchi confirms Witkoff messages, denies negotiations, seeks 'complete end' not ceasefire.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Iran has 'necessary will' to end war but seeking guarantees — Pezeshkian
outlets.summary: Reports Pezeshkian's call with EU's Costa. Iran signals openness to ending war if guarantees provided.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF says Beirut strikes targeted a top Hezbollah commander
outlets.summary: Covers dual airstrike on Khalde/Jnah targeting Hezbollah commanders, 7 killed, 24 wounded.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF strikes over 1,600 km away, drops 80+ explosives on Tehran weapons sites
outlets.summary: Details IDF's wide-scale wave of strikes on 40 weapon production sites across Tehran over 2 days.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran rejects US proposal, lays out five conditions for ending imposed war
outlets.summary: Iranian state media frames rejection of US 15-point plan and presents Iran's counterproposal conditions.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Iran International reports 4,700 security forces killed — rift deepens between Pezeshkian and IRGC
outlets.summary: Higher casualty estimate than official figures. Internal power struggle between president and IRGC over war strategy.
